conversation_history.content: Hello! To help you with loan eligibility, please provide your Monthly Income, Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure in years.
my monthly income is 1 lakh, emi is 30k, down payment is 8 lakh, tenure 5 years
Thank you for the information! I've noted your monthly income as ₹100000, existing EMI as ₹30000, and down payment as ₹800000. Can you please confirm the loan tenure in years?
Great! I've noted your loan tenure as 5 years. Now, I'll send all the information for assessment.
